Generations from uncached inference serve as matching targets, paired with a reward for generation quality. ReCache is compatible with any caching mechanism, including feature reuse and feature forecasting; for each mechanism, a single trained policy adapts across computational budgets at inference time. ReCache consistently outperforms scheduling baselines: under a $\times5.04$ FLOPs reduction on FLUX, it reduces LPIPS by 31% (from 0.456 to 0.316) compared to DiCache; on Wan 2.1 at a $\sim \times2.6$ speedup, it drops LPIPS by 65% (from 0.480 to 0.169) and boosts the VBench score by 7% (5.6 points, from 70.4 to 76.0) over uniform HiCache. Code is available at https://github.com/thecrazymage/ReCache.

</details>


### [75] [VZCrash: A Large-Scale IMU Dataset of Ego-Vehicle Crashes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06074)
*Tommaso Bianconcini,Henrique Piñeiro Monteagudo,Aurel Pjetri,Tomaso Trinci,Leonardo Taccari*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文介绍了VZCrash——目前最大规模的公开真实车辆碰撞数据集，包含超3.1万次验证碰撞事件及15.8万负样本，并基于该数据集开展了大规模实验，验证了数据规模对 crash 检测模型性能与实际部署效果的关键作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有车辆碰撞检测研究受限于小规模、仿真或非公开数据集，难以支撑鲁棒、可部署的模型训练；亟需大规模、真实、多样的公开碰撞数据集以推动方法发展与实际落地。

Method: 构建并发布VZCrash数据集（含IMU与GPS信号），设计涵盖启发式阈值法到SOTA深度学习模型的系统性基准实验，并通过控制变量实验分析数据规模对模型性能及现实部署效果的影响。

Result: 实验证明：1）更大规模的数据显著提升 crash 检测模型精度与泛化能力；2）在真实部署场景中，数据规模对模型鲁棒性（尤其对硬样本和干扰项）具有决定性影响；3）深度学习模型明显优于传统启发式方法。

Conclusion: VZCrash为车辆安全感知提供了关键基础设施；数据规模是训练高质、可部署 crash 检测模型的核心因素，未来研究应重视真实大规模数据的构建与利用。

Abstract: We introduce VZCrash, the largest publicly available dataset of real-world vehicle collision data featuring Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) telemetry. The dataset contains more than 31,000 validated crashes and 158,000 negative samples, including hard cases and distractors. Each sample includes acceleration and angular velocity at 100 Hz, and GPS speed at 1 Hz. Events in VZCrash were captured by devices installed on a fleet of 73,010 commercial vehicles of different sizes driving in the United States over the span of several years. We also present an extensive experimental study enabled by the volume of the dataset. We first benchmark several different approaches, from a simple threshold-based heuristic to state-of-the-art deep learning models. Then, we present an experiment demonstrating the importance of scaling data to train high-quality crash detection models, and we show that scale is especially important when these models need to be deployed into a real-world environment.

</details>


### [76] [Knowledge Distillation for Visual Autoregressive Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06078)
*Elia Peruzzo,Aritra Bhowmik,Guillaume Sautiere,Yuki M Asano,Amirhossein Habibian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了VarKD，一种针对视觉自回归图像生成模型的知识蒸馏框架，通过在学生样本上进行蒸馏并选择性地应用教师监督、降低词元级歧义，显著提升了压缩效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归（AR）图像生成模型表达能力强但计算开销大，知识蒸馏（KD）虽在语言建模中广泛应用，但在视觉AR生成中的适用性尚不明确，尤其面临长解码周期和视觉词元歧义导致的教师监督不可靠问题。

Method: 提出VarKD蒸馏框架：在学生生成的样本上进行蒸馏，结合选择性教师监督与词元歧义缓解机制，适配视觉AR模型特性。

Result: 在ImageNet数据集上，VarKD在多个AR骨干网络上持续优于现有蒸馏基线，显著缩小了小模型与大规模模型之间的性能差距。

Conclusion: 标准知识蒸馏对视觉AR模型效果有限，VarKD通过适配视觉生成特性（如解码长度、词元歧义），实现了更有效的模型压缩，为视觉AR模型的高效部署提供了新思路。

Abstract: Autoregressive (AR) image generation models are highly expressive but computationally intensive, motivating effective model compression. Knowledge distillation (KD) is a natural approach for model compression and has been widely studied in language modeling, yet its behavior in visual AR generation remains underexplored. In this work, we present the first systematic study of distillation strategies for AR image models. Our analysis shows that while standard distillation can yield meaningful gains, recent methods developed for language do not directly transfer to images: long decoding horizons and visual token ambiguity make teacher supervision unreliable especially under student-conditioned contexts. To address this, we propose VarKD, a distillation framework for visual autoregressive models that distills on student samples while selectively applying teacher supervision and reducing token-level ambiguity. Experiments on ImageNet across multiple AR backbones show that VarKD consistently outperforms prior distillation baselines, narrowing the gap to large-scale models.

</details>


### [77] [HyperVis: Continuous Latent Visual Relational Graphs on the Lorentz Hyperboloid for Compositional Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06100)
*Moshiur Farazi,Sameera Ramasinghe,Mahbub Ahmed Turza,Shafin Rahman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出HyperVis方法，通过在双曲空间中建模视觉关系张量来提升VLM的组合推理能力，避免了传统场景图生成器引入离散标签导致的性能下降；该方法既可作为训练时正则化器提升生成式VQA性能，也可作为推理时关系编码器增强判别式组合评分，并发现强曲率双曲空间对连续视觉特征建模至关重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLMs）在需要理解物体间关系的组合推理任务上表现不佳；直接引入外部场景图生成器（SGG）提供的离散三元组会与连续视觉模态冲突，反而降低性能。

Method: 提出HyperVis：从类无关区域提议中构建稠密视觉关系张量，通过空间偏差交叉注意力计算，并将其投影到洛伦兹双曲面；利用空间物理原理（IoA驱动的蕴含锥与外角排斥）施加层次结构约束；在双曲空间中设计关系损失用于LoRA微调，并在推理时使用双曲前缀标记增强组合评分。

Result: HyperVis作为训练正则器将GQA准确率从57.21%提升至61.03%；作为推理编码器将SugarCrepe得分提升至79.94%（+6.25pp）；学习得到稳定曲率κ=4.0，显著高于以往工作；消融实验证明双曲几何对组合性增益具有不可替代性。

Conclusion: 连续视觉特征更适配高曲率双曲空间建模；HyperVis绕过离散语义瓶颈，在训练和推理两个阶段均有效提升VLM的组合推理能力，验证了显式、几何感知的关系建模对VLM的重要性。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle with compositional reasoning that requires understanding inter-object relationships. A natural remedy is to inject explicit scene graph triplets $\langle s, p, o \rangle$ from an off-the-shelf scene graph generator (SGG), but we show this backfires: discrete text labels collide with the continuous visual modality, degrading GQA accuracy from 60.38\% to 58.86\%. We propose \textbf{HyperVis}, which bypasses the SGG semantic bottleneck entirely. From $N$ class-agnostic region proposals, we compute a dense $O(N^2)$ visual relation tensor via spatially-biased cross-attention, project it onto a Lorentz hyperboloid, and enforce hierarchy through spatial physics, namely IoA-driven entailment cones and exterior-angle repulsion. We discover that HyperVis contributes in two complementary ways: (1) as a \emph{training-time regularizer}, the hyperbolic relational losses shape LoRA representations that improve generative VQA (GQA 61.03\% vs.\ 57.21\% for LoRA fine-tuning without relational losses, recovering and surpassing the baseline); and (2) as an \emph{inference-time relational encoder}, hyperbolic prefix tokens boost discriminative compositional scoring (SugarCrepe 79.94\%, $+$6.25pp over baseline). The learned curvature stabilises at $κ{=}4.0$, an order of magnitude above prior hyperbolic VLMs where $κ$ typically collapses toward zero, indicating that continuous visual features genuinely require the exponential volume of strongly curved space. A controlled Euclidean ablation confirms this decomposition: the relational pipeline regularises LoRA comparably in flat space (GQA 60.81\%), but the compositionality gain is specifically hyperbolic (SugarCrepe $+$4.58pp over Euclidean), with entailment loss ${\sim}6{\times}$ higher in Euclidean training. Codes are available at TBA.

</details>


### [78] [MS-DKC: A Dataset Knowledge Card Framework for Designing and Adapting Medical Image Segmentation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06103)
*Tariq M. Khan,Syed Saud Naqvi,Thantrira Porntaveetus,Hamid Alinejad-Rokny,Shahzaib Iqbal,Imran Razzak,Mohammad AU Khan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出医学图像分割数据集知识卡（MS-DKC）框架，旨在显式刻画影响分割性能的关键数据特性（如前景占比、形态、边界模糊性等），并据此指导模型设计与评估，强调‘数据驱动’而非‘架构优先’的设计范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医学图像分割研究过度关注网络架构改进，却忽视了数据本身的特性（如前景稀疏性、形态复杂性、标注质量、采集差异等）对模型需求的根本影响。

Method: 提出MS-DKC框架，通过图像/采集、形态、监督方式、上下文依赖性和部署风险五大类描述符，系统记录数据集特征，并映射至典型失败模式、设计先验与风险对齐的评估准则；在DRIVE、ISIC2018和ACDC三个典型数据集上验证该框架指导下的定制化模型设计与评估流程。

Result: 在DRIVE上，DKC-TNet-v2和SA-UNetv2-DKC-AmbRef分别取得Dice 0.8044/0.8141；在ISIC2018上，MS-DKC-AttNextTopo-VCSF-NoAug取得Dice 0.8872；在ACDC上验证了多类别softmax、类别平衡损失与逐类表面评估的有效性；结果表明不同数据集需匹配不同先验、操作点与证据支持。

Conclusion: 医学图像分割应转向‘数据条件化设计’：模型选择与评估必须基于对数据集内在特性的结构化认知，MS-DKC为实现可追溯、风险对齐的分割开发提供了系统性工具。

Abstract: Medical image segmentation is often framed as a search for stronger architectures, but this can obscure a more fundamental question: what does the dataset require from the model? In medical imaging, this requirement is shaped by foreground occupancy, morphology, boundary ambiguity, topology sensitivity, annotation quality, acquisition variation, and operating point.
  This paper introduces the Medical Segmentation Dataset Knowledge Card (MS-DKC), a framework for making these factors explicit. MS-DKC records dataset evidence through image/acquisition, morphology, supervision, context-dependence, and deployment-risk descriptors. These descriptors are mapped to failure modes, design priors, and risk-aligned criteria, making segmentation design more traceable than architecture-first comparison.
  We evaluate MS-DKC on DRIVE, ISIC2018, and ACDC, representing distinct regimes. DRIVE contains sparse, thin, branching vessels, favoring detail-preserving models, sensitivity-aware optimization, threshold analysis, and topology-aware metrics. DKC-TNet-v2 achieved Dice 0.8044 and IoU 0.6730 with 35103 parameters, while SA-UNetv2-DKC-AmbRef reached Dice 0.8141, IoU 0.6865, sensitivity 0.8265, specificity 0.9804, and AUC 0.9853. ISIC2018 involves compact but appearance-variable lesions; validation-constrained score-function selection on Att-Next-Topo/ATTNext produced MS-DKC-AttNextTopo-VCSF-NoAug with Dice 0.8872, IoU 0.8214, precision 0.9173, Boundary F1 0.4878, and ASSD 4.13, while plausible additions failed to improve the risk-aligned profile. ACDC provides a multi-class cardiac case, where MS-DKC recommends four-class softmax segmentation, class-balanced Dice/CE supervision, and class-wise surface evaluation. Overall, the results support dataset-conditioned design: different datasets require different priors, operating points, and evidence before a model can be judged appropriate.

</details>


### [79] [Where, What, Why, and Importance: Structured Defect Grounding for Text-to-Image Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06113)
*Huaisong Zhang,Hao Yu,Yuxuan Zhang,Jiahe Wang,Xinrui Chen,Haoxiang Cao,Feng Lu,Wendong Zhang,Changqian Yu,Chun Yuan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出结构化缺陷定位（SDG）方法，将文本到图像生成的诊断建模为结构化集合预测，每个缺陷表示为（位置、类型、原因、重要性）元组，并构建SDG-30K数据集与评估协议SDG-Eval；进一步设计诊断到对齐框架，利用VLM检测缺陷、BoxFlow-GRPO生成空间奖励以提升扩散模型对齐与局部图像优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到图像模型存在局部、细微且结构复杂的失败，而当前密集反馈方法仍局限于像素场回归，难以准确定位变长缺陷并绑定语义原因。

Method: 提出结构化缺陷定位（SDG），将诊断建模为（位置、类型、原因、重要性）元组的集合预测；构建SDG-30K数据集及SDG-Eval评估协议；设计基于VLM的SDG检测器与BoxFlow-GRPO奖励转换机制，实现诊断到对齐的端到端框架。

Result: SDG检测器在结构化缺陷定位任务上超越主流专有VLM；SDG引导的空间奖励持续提升T2I对齐效果，并支持局部图像精细化修复。

Conclusion: SDG建立了统一的实例级接口，可同时支撑生成模型的诊断、评估与增强，突破了传统像素级反馈的表征瓶颈。

Abstract: Despite generating increasingly photorealistic images, text-to-image (T2I) models still exhibit localized, subtle, and structurally complex failures. Diagnosing these failures requires instance-level feedback that answers where a defect occurs, what type it is, why it is defective, and its importance to overall image quality. While recent dense-feedback methods move beyond scalar supervision, their heatmap-centric representations still formulate diagnosis as pixel-field regression, making it difficult to localize variable-cardinality defects and bind semantic reasons to individual failures. To address this representation bottleneck, we propose Structured Defect Grounding (SDG), which casts T2I diagnosis as structured set prediction by modeling each defect as a (location, type, reason, importance) tuple. To make this formulation trainable and measurable, we introduce SDG-30K, a 30K-image dataset with box-grounded annotations across four modern T2I generators, together with a dedicated evaluation protocol, SDG-Eval. Building on this structured representation, we further present a diagnosis-to-alignment framework in which a Vision-Language Model (VLM) serves as the SDG detector, and BoxFlow-GRPO converts predicted defect sets into box-derived, importance-weighted spatial rewards for diffusion model alignment. Extensive experiments show that our SDG detector outperforms leading proprietary VLMs on structured defect grounding, while SDG-guided rewards consistently improve T2I alignment and support localized image refinement. These results establish SDG as a unified, instance-level interface for diagnosing, evaluating, and enhancing modern generative models.

</details>


### [80] [Diff-CA: Separating Common and Salient Factors with Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06120)
*Michaël Soumm,Alexandre Fournier Montgieux,Yunlong He,Pietro Gori,Alasdair Newson*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的新型对比分解框架，通过弱监督学习将条件分解为公共因子和显著因子，在不牺牲生成质量的前提下实现高质量图像的对比分析与编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于生成模型（如VAE或GAN）的对比分析方法受限于重建质量和图像保真度，难以有效分离潜在因子并应用于高保真图像生成与编辑。

Method: 提出一种面向扩散模型的条件框架：首先训练一个无提示、图像条件化的扩散模型，再通过弱监督学习将条件分解为公共因子和显著因子；理论证明了加性对比因子分解在温和条件下的可识别性。

Result: 实现了高质量图像的对比分解，支持仅对显著因子进行交换或插值等目标操作，提升了对比分析在高保真图像生成与编辑中的实用性。

Conclusion: 该方法克服了传统生成模型在对比分析中的局限性，为高保真图像的对比建模与可控编辑提供了新范式。

Abstract: Contrastive Analysis aims to separate factors that are common between two data distributions from those that are salient to only one of them. Existing contrastive methods are based on generative models (e.g., VAEs or GANs) that often suffer from limited reconstruction and image quality, which hampers effective latent factor separation and limits their applicability to high-fidelity image generation and edition. We propose a novel conditioning framework for diffusion models that enables contrastive decomposition without compromising generation quality. We first train a prompt-free, image-conditioned diffusion model, and then learn to decompose the conditioning into a common and a salient factor, using weak supervision. We prove that the additive contrastive factorization, commonly assumed in prior work, is identifiable under mild conditions. This factorization enables targeted operations by swapping or interpolating only the salient factor.

</details>


### [81] [Computation-Aware Event-to-Frame Reconstruction via Selective Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06142)
*Jingqian Wu,Yunbo Jia,Edmund Y. Lam*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效的事件到帧（E2F）重建框架，通过因果时序建模与计算感知设计，在保持高重建质量的同时显著提升计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有E2F方法在重建质量与计算效率之间存在权衡，难以兼顾高精度与低复杂度，尤其在快速运动和光照变化下鲁棒性不足。

Method: 采用循环编码器-解码器结构进行增量式事件信息聚合；引入选择性上下文融合策略，结合事件特征与先验强度线索；设计轻量级混合注意力机制增强特征选择性。

Result: 在标准基准上实现了具有竞争力的重建性能，在精度与模型复杂度之间取得良好平衡。

Conclusion: 所提框架通过因果建模、上下文融合与轻量注意力，有效提升了E2F重建的效率与鲁棒性，为事件相机实际部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Event-to-frame (E2F) reconstruction bridges asynchronous event streams with frame-based vision pipelines, but existing methods often face a trade-off between reconstruction quality and computational efficiency. In this work, we propose an efficient E2F framework that emphasizes causal temporal modeling and computation-aware design. The architecture adopts a recurrent encoder-decoder to incrementally aggregate event information with compact hidden states. To improve robustness under fast motion and illumination variations, a selective context fusion strategy is introduced to integrate event-driven features with prior intensity cues. Within this fusion process, a lightweight hybrid attention mechanism enhances feature selectivity without relying on heavy attention operations. Experimental results on standard benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves competitive reconstruction performance while maintaining a favorable balance between accuracy and model complexity.

</details>


### [82] [Adaptive Tokenisation Via Temporal Redundancy Masking And Latent Inpainting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06158)
*Kevin Dave,Sai Aditya Patkuri,Chhaya Kumar Das,Gouranga Bala,R. Venkatesh Babu,Rajeshkumar SA*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需额外计算开销的参数自由自适应视频分词方法，利用冻结连续视频分词器的潜在空间中固有的时间冗余性，通过固定阈值筛选变化小的潜在位置并丢弃，再用轻量级Latent Inpainting Transformer（LIT）重建，显著提升推理速度并保持重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自适应视频分词方法存在高计算开销问题：连续方法依赖迭代搜索或神经回归器，离散方法常需全码率解码估计信息量。

Method: 利用冻结连续视频分词器潜在空间中的时间冗余性，对每个空间位置计算相邻帧间潜在表示的L1时序差，并以固定阈值剔除变化微小的位置；使用轻量化的因子化时空注意力架构Latent Inpainting Transformer（LIT）重建被丢弃位置。

Result: 在TokenBench和DAVIS基准上，该方法实现内容驱动的自适应分词，在保持竞争性重建保真度的同时，推理速度比ElasticTok-CV快31倍、比InfoTok快约2倍。

Conclusion: 无需训练或辅助路由网络，仅靠冻结分词器的内在特性与简单阈值策略即可高效实现内容自适应视频分词，为高效视频理解提供了新范式。

Abstract: Adaptive video tokenisation seeks to dynamically allocate token budgets based on the underlying visual complexity of a sequence. Current continuous-regime approaches achieve this via iterative binarised searches or trained neural regressors, while discrete methods often require a full-rate decoder pass to estimate information content. We demonstrate that such computational overheads are not strictly necessary. We show that the latent space of a frozen continuous video tokeniser inherently encodes temporal redundancy that can be exploited directly: spatial positions whose latent representations change minimally between consecutive frames carry near-zero additional information.
  We introduce a parameter-free adaptive token allocation mechanism that applies a fixed threshold to per-position temporal-L1 differences, identifying and dropping redundant latent positions. Consequently, the compression rate emerges naturally from the input content rather than being enforced top-down: static scenes get compressed aggressively, while highly dynamic sequences retain more tokens. To reconstruct the dropped positions, we propose the Latent Inpainting Transformer (LIT), a lightweight factorised spatial-temporal attention architecture. The resulting inference pipeline is highly efficient, requiring only a single encoder pass and one LIT forward pass, eliminating the need for auxiliary routing networks. Evaluations across TokenBench and DAVIS, which are the standard benchmarks used by recent tokenisers~\cite{infotok, agarwal2025cosmos}, indicate that our framework yields meaningful, content-driven token allocation while maintaining competitive reconstruction fidelity, and delivers a $31\times$ inference-time speedup over the continuous adaptive baseline (ElasticTok-CV) and an $\approx2\times$ speedup over the discrete information-theoretic baseline (InfoTok)

</details>


### [83] [RQUL-UIE: Revitalizing Quality-Unstable Labels for Underwater Image Enhancement via In-Dataset Self-Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06176)
*Haochen Hu,Yanrui Bin,Chih-yung Wen,Bing Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的无配对数据自监督水下图像增强方法，利用预训练扩散模型评估标签质量并指导多级去噪，结合傅里叶域精修网络提升高频重建，显著超越现有SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的水下图像增强方法大多依赖配对数据集，但其标签质量不稳定，限制了模型性能。

Method: 提出一种基于扩散模型的、数据集内自监督学习策略：利用预训练扩散模型提取语义感知嵌入，无训练地评估标签质量；将质量分数量化为噪声层级索引，用于多步去噪过程中的层级监督；并引入基于傅里叶变换的精修网络以显式重建高频成分。

Result: 在多个基准上全面超越当前SOTA方法，恢复质量显著提升。

Conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了标签质量不稳定带来的训练瓶颈，在无需高质量配对标签的前提下实现了更鲁棒、更高质量的水下图像增强。

Abstract: Underwater Image Enhancement (UIE) is essential for mitigating degradations caused by water medium. Although learning-based methods have advanced significantly, most rely on paired datasets with unstable label quality, which bottlenecks model performance. This paper proposes a diffusion-based, in-dataset self-supervised learning strategy designed to exploit the quality distribution of training labels. Specifically, we evaluate label quality via semantic perception embeddings from a pre-trained diffusion model in a training-free manner. These quality scores are subsequently quantized into noise-level indices, guiding a multi-step denoising process for level-wise supervision. This mechanism prevents low-quality labels from degrading the model while maximizing their utility during training. Furthermore, a Fourier-based refinement network is incorporated to explicitly reconstruct high-frequency components. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms SOTA approaches in restoration quality. The code and pre-trained model will be available once accepted in link.

</details>


### [84] [Adversarial Attacks Already Tell the Answer: Directional Bias-Guided Test-time Defense for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06186)
*Liangsheng Liu,Si Chen,Jiamin Wu,Weiwei Feng,Zhixin Cheng,Xiaotian Yin,Wenfei Yang,Tianzhu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Directional Bias-guided Defense (DBD) 的测试时防御框架，利用对抗样本在CLIP特征空间中沿主导方向偏移的规律，通过估计‘防御方向’并结合双流重建策略提升鲁棒性，在15个数据集上达到SOTA性能，甚至出现对抗准确率超过干净准确率的反直觉现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Vision-Language Models（如CLIP）虽具强零样本泛化能力，但易受对抗扰动影响，亟需高效、无需重训练的测试时防御方法。

Method: 发现对抗图像在CLIP特征空间中沿单一主导方向系统性偏移，而干净图像分布更分散；据此提出DBD框架：估计该‘Defense Direction’，并设计基于DB-score的双流重建策略以恢复鲁棒表征。

Result: 在15个数据集上验证DBD显著提升对抗鲁棒性，保持甚至略微提升干净准确率，并首次观察到对抗准确率可超越干净准确率。

Conclusion: 对抗扰动并非完全破坏语义，而是隐含指向真实决策边界的定向先验；DBD通过建模该先验实现高效测试时防御，揭示了对抗样本潜在的结构可利用性。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs), such as CLIP, have shown strong zero-shot generalization but remain highly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, posing serious risks in real-world applications. Test-time defenses for VLMs have recently emerged as a promising and efficient approach to defend against adversarial attacks without requiring costly large-scale retraining. In this work, we uncover a surprising phenomenon: under diverse input transformations, adversarial images in CLIP's feature space consistently shift along a dominant direction, in contrast to the dispersed patterns of clean images. We hypothesize that this dominant shift, termed the Defense Direction, opposes the adversarial shift, pointing features back toward their correct class centers. Building on this insight, we propose Directional Bias-guided Defense (DBD), a test-time framework that estimates the Defense Direction and employs a DB-score-based two-stream reconstruction strategy to recover robust representations. Experiments on 15 datasets demonstrate that DBD not only achieves SOTA adversarial robustness while preserving clean accuracy, but also reveals the counterintuitive result that adversarial accuracy can even surpass clean accuracy. This demonstrates that adversarial perturbations inherently encode directional priors about the true decision boundary.

</details>


### [85] [DisasterBench: A Multimodal Benchmark for UAV-Based Disaster Response in Complex Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06217)
*Tan Zhang,Quanyou Li,Lu Zhang,Jun Liu,Xiaofeng Zhu,Ping Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了DisasterBench——一个面向无人机灾情响应的多阶段多模态推理基准，并配套设计了轻量级多模态模型DisasterVL，在边缘设备上实现高效、准确的灾情因果归因、传播预测与决策推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型和多模态基准侧重感知任务（如识别与描述），缺乏对灾情响应所需的多阶段（灾前/中/后）、因果性、预测性与决策导向推理的支持，且难以适配低空无人机视角与边缘计算约束。

Method: 构建涵盖14类灾害场景、9项关键任务的DisasterBench基准，明确建模灾害-任务映射；提出轻量级模型DisasterVL，采用三阶段优化流程：领域指令微调、思维链引导的多模态对齐、基于强化学习的策略优化。

Result: 在21个主流多模态大模型上评测表明，2B参数的DisasterVL显著优于所有开源模型，推理精度接近GPT-4o，同时具备更高效率。

Conclusion: DisasterBench与DisasterVL共同推动了面向真实应急响应场景的轻量化、可解释、多阶段多模态推理研究，为边缘AI赋能灾害治理提供了新范式。

Abstract: When a disaster unfolds, responders must answer not only what is happening, but also why it is happening, what will happen next, and what to do now, often from noisy low-altitude UAV views and under tight on-site compute constraints. However, most existing multimodal benchmarks emphasize perception (e.g., recognition/description), cover limited disaster types, and provide insufficient support for the multi-stage reasoning required in practical emergency response. We introduce DisasterBench, a multi-stage multimodal reasoning benchmark for UAV-Based disaster response in complex environments. DisasterBench spans 14 disaster-related scene types and 9 response-critical tasks across pre-, during-, and post-disaster stages, with fine-grained disaster-task mappings that explicitly test causal attribution, propagation prediction, damage analysis, and decision-oriented reasoning. To enable reasoning on the edge, we further propose DisasterVL, a lightweight multimodal model optimized with a three-stage pipeline combining domain instruction tuning, chain-of-thought-guided multimodal alignment, and reinforcement learning-based policy optimization. Experiments across 21 popular MLLMs show that our 2B-parameter DisasterVL outperforms all evaluated open-source models and substantially narrows the gap to state-of-the-art closed-source models, achieving GPT-4o-comparable reasoning accuracy with superior efficiency. The project page is available at https://github.com/TanmouTT/DisasterBench.

</details>


### [86] [Symb-xMIL: Symbolic Explanations for Multiple Instance Learning in Digital Pathology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06224)
*Yanqing Luo,Julius Hense,Niklas Prenißl,Andreas Mock,Klaus-Robert Müller,Thomas Schnake,Mina Jamshidi Idaji*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Symb-xMIL，一种面向多实例学习（MIL）模型的符号化后验解释框架，通过逻辑规则（如AND/OR/NOT）量化模型行为与人类可读决策规则的一致性，提升数字病理学中MIL模型的语义可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MIL解释方法（如热图）仅定位重要区域，无法揭示不同组织区域间证据如何组合形成预测，尤其难以刻画组织特征间的交互，限制了临床可信度和发现能力。

Method: 提出Symbolic explainable MIL（Symb-xMIL），将MIL模型预测映射到逻辑规则空间，计算模型输出与各类人工定义或自动挖掘的符号规则之间的对齐得分；在合成数据与真实病理数据（肿瘤检测、TCGA-HNSCC HPV预测）上验证。

Result: 在合成数据中准确恢复真值逻辑规则；在临床肿瘤检测任务中揭示异质性决策模式并暴露隐藏模型错误；在HPV预测任务中改进患者生存分层，超越单纯HPV状态的临床判别力。

Conclusion: Symb-xMIL将MIL解释从可视化归因推进到结构化、语义驱动的规则推理，为数字病理学提供更透明、可理解、具临床意义的模型解释新范式。

Abstract: Explanations of multiple instance learning (MIL) models are widely used for validation and discovery in digital histopathology. Existing methods primarily rely on heatmaps that highlight influential regions but do not explain how evidence from different tissue regions is combined to produce a prediction. This limits interpretability, especially when decisions depend on interactions between tissue features. We introduce Symbolic explainable MIL (Symb-xMIL), a post-hoc explanation framework that quantifies how a MIL model's behavior aligns with human-readable decision rules, expressed as logical relationships (e.g., AND, OR, NOT) between input features. These alignment scores reveal semantic patterns underlying the model's predictions. We evaluate Symb-xMIL on synthetic and real-world histopathology datasets. On synthetic MIL data, Symb-xMIL reliably recovers ground-truth logical rules. In a clinical tumor detection task, the best-aligned rules uncover heterogeneous decision patterns and expose hidden model errors. On an HPV-prediction task on TCGA-HNSCC, a cohort of head and neck cancer, our framework refines patient survival stratification beyond HPV status with potential clinical relevance. Overall, Symb-xMIL extends MIL explainability beyond visual attribution toward structured, rule-based reasoning, enabling more transparent and semantically grounded interpretation of model predictions.

</details>


### [87] [SAM-Flow: Source-Anchored Masked Flow for Training-Free Image Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06228)
*Haowang Cui,Rui Chen,Tao Luo,Tao Guo,Zheng Qin,Jiaze Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SAM-Flow是一种无需训练的局部图像编辑方法，通过源锚定掩码流机制，在保持背景不变的前提下实现精准语义编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于反转和微分流的方法常进行全局潜在空间传输，导致编辑效应泄露至非目标区域、背景失真。

Method: 提出SAM-Flow框架：利用探针图像与token级注意力图定位可编辑语义区域；仅在该区域内施加微分速度更新，并将其余区域锚定至源图像潜在轨迹；引入时变源锚定投影机制（含动态软掩码、过渡区与时间掩码累积）以提升空间稳定性和边界自然性。

Result: 在主流流匹配模型（如Stable Diffusion 3、FLUX）上即插即用，无需微调；实验表明其在语义编辑准确性与背景保持能力上显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: SAM-Flow提供了一种简单、通用且高效的训练自由局部图像编辑范式。

Abstract: Training-free image editing has recently attracted increasing attention due to its ability to modify real images using powerful pre-trained diffusion and flow-matching models without additional training. However, existing inversion-based and differential-flow-based methods usually perform global latent transport, which inevitably propagates editing effects to non-target regions and leads to background leakage. To address this problem, we propose SAM-Flow, a source-anchored masked flow framework for localized training-free image editing. Instead of updating the whole latent representation, SAM-Flow first uses a scout image and token-grounded attention maps to localize the editable semantic regions. It then applies differential velocity updates only within these regions, while anchoring the remaining areas to the source-image latent trajectory. To further improve spatial stability and boundary naturalness, we introduce a time-varying source-anchored projection mechanism with dynamic soft masks, transition regions, and temporal mask accumulation. The proposed method is plug-and-play and can be integrated with mainstream flow-matching backbones such as Stable Diffusion 3 and FLUX without any fine-tuning. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that SAM-Flow achieves accurate semantic editing while significantly improving background preservation, providing a simple and general localized editing paradigm for training-free image editing. Code is available at: https://github.com/chwbob/Sam-Flow.

</details>


### [88] [GRAMformer: Any-Order Modality Interactions via Volumetric Multimodal Cross-Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06249)
*Giordano Cicchetti,Eleonora Grassucci,Danilo Comminiello*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的体积式多模态交叉注意力机制（VMA），通过计算查询与多个模态键向量在联合几何空间中张成的体积，来建模任意阶多模态交互，克服了现有方法仅依赖成对点积或拼接导致的复杂度高或无法显式建模高阶联合依赖的问题；并构建了支持任意模态数的GRAMformer架构，在多模态任务上验证了其有效性与效率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态注意力机制受限于仅使用成对点积或键拼接，难以高效且显式地建模多个模态间的联合依赖关系，导致计算复杂度高或忽略高阶交互。

Method: 提出体积式多模态交叉注意力（VMA），将注意力分数定义为查询向量与各模态键向量在联合空间中张成的几何体积；将其嵌入新设计的GRAMformer Transformer架构中，支持任意数量模态的原生集成。

Result: 在多模态学习任务上，GRAMformer相较于基线模型展现出更高的有效性与计算效率。

Conclusion: VMA能更本质地刻画多模态联合依赖，GRAMformer为灵活、高效、可扩展的多模态融合提供了新范式。

Abstract: Transformer-based multimodal models rely on attention mechanisms to integrate information across heterogeneous modalities. Despite their success, existing multimodal attention formulations compute their scores through collections of pairwise dot-product interactions or by concatenating all the modalities into the keys, even when multiple modalities should be jointly involved. As a consequence, current approaches either incur quadratic complexity in the number of modalities or fail to explicitly model interactions that depend on the joint configuration of multiple representations. In this work, we introduce the Volumetric Multimodal cross-Attention (VMA), a novel cross-attention mechanism in which attention scores are defined as a function of the joint geometry of a query and multiple modality-specific keys. VMA computes the volume spanned by query and key vectors across multiple modalities, capturing joint multimodal dependencies beyond pairwise similarity, enabling native modeling of any-order modality interactions. We integrate VMA into our novel multimodal transformer architecture, named GRAMformer, explicitly designed to integrate any number of modalities. We evaluate the proposed model on multimodal learning tasks, demonstrating improved effectiveness and efficiency.

</details>


### [89] [Geodesic Flow Matching on a Riemannian Degradation Manifold for Blind Image Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06278)
*Akshay Janardan Bankar,Ankita Chatterjee,Sayan Banerjee,Shreyas Pandith,Kalakonda Sai Shashank,Amit Satish Unde*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于黎曼流形的盲图像恢复方法，将退化过程建模为低维黎曼流形上的点，并将恢复建模为联合图像-流形空间上的测地线传输，利用测地线流匹配目标学习符合退化空间曲率的内在传输动力学。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有确定性基于流的方法隐含假设退化几何是线性的（欧氏插值），难以合理处理未知且可能混合的退化类型。

Method: 将退化显式建模为低维黎曼流形上的点，将图像恢复建模为联合图像-流形空间上的测地线传输，并采用测地线流匹配（geodesic flow matching）目标进行训练。

Result: 该框架推广了线性流匹配，为混合退化提供了基于测地线组合的原理性建模，并能理论解释对未见退化类型的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 所提测地线传输框架更真实地刻画退化结构，提升了盲图像恢复在复杂、混合及未见退化下的鲁棒性与泛化性。

Abstract: Blind image restoration requires recovering clean images from observations corrupted by unknown and potentially mixed degradations. While recent deterministic flow-based methods model restoration as transport processes that map degraded images to clean ones, they typically rely on Euclidean interpolation, implicitly assuming linear degradation geometry. In this paper, we explicitly model degradations as points on a low-dimensional Riemannian manifold and formulate restoration as geodesic transport on the joint image-manifold space. Using a geodesic flow matching objective, we learn intrinsic transport dynamics that respect the curvature of degradation space. This framework generalizes linear flow matching, provides a principled treatment of mixed degradations as geodesic compositions, and yields a clean theoretical interpretation for generalization beyond observed degradations.

</details>


### [90] [Towards One-to-Many Temporal Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06294)
*Qi Xu,Yue Tan,Shihao Chen,Jiahao Meng,Anna Wang,Shunping Ji,Hao Fei,Jason Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向“一对多”时间定位（OMTG）任务的系统性解决方案，包括首个OMTG基准、高质量数据集及专为OMTG设计的新型时序与字幕奖励函数，显著提升了多片段定位性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实场景中常需为单个文本查询定位多个不连续视频片段（即OMTG），但现有主流多模态大模型（MLLMs）缺乏事件基数感知能力，在此任务上表现极差。

Method: 构建首个OMTG基准并提出新指标（C-Acc和EtF1）；构建含56k样本的高质量OMTG数据集；设计新型时序奖励与基于链式思维推理的字幕奖励函数以优化策略。

Result: 在OMTG Bench上取得43.65%的新SOTA EtF1，较Gemini 2.5 Pro和Seed-1.8分别提升15.85%和15.61%。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了OMTG任务中事件基数建模缺失的问题，验证了专用奖励机制与高质量基准对多片段定位任务的关键作用。

Abstract: Temporal Grounding (TG) aims to localize video segments corresponding to a textual query. Prior research predominantly focuses on single-segment retrieval. Real-world scenarios, however, often require localizing multiple disjoint segments for a single query -- a setting we term One-to-Many Temporal Grounding (OMTG). Previous state-of-the-art MLLMs, optimized for one-to-one settings, struggle in this context, often yielding near-zero scores due to a lack of event cardinality perception. To bridge this gap, we present a systematic solution with three key contributions. First, we establish the first comprehensive OMTG benchmark, introducing Count Accuracy (C-Acc) and Effective Temporal F1 (EtF1) as evaluation metrics. Second, we curate a high-quality OMTG dataset comprising 56k samples through a sophisticated construction pipeline. Third, we develop novel temporal and caption reward functions specifically designed for OMTG. In particular, the caption reward leverages Chain-of-Thought reasoning over dense video captions to explicitly guide policy optimization toward both preciseness and completeness. Extensive experiments show our model achieves a new state-of-the-art EtF1 of 43.65\% on OMTG Bench, outperforming Gemini 2.5 Pro and Seed-1.8 by 15.85\% and 15.61\%, respectively.

</details>


### [91] [RhymeFlow: Training-Free Acceleration for Video Generation with Asynchronous Denoising Flow Scheduling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06309)
*Chensheng Dai,Shengjun Zhang,Yifan Li,Zhang Zhang,Zheng Zhu,Yueqi Duan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RhymeFlow是一种无需训练的视频生成加速框架，通过解耦不同帧的去噪轨迹，在保证视觉质量的同时显著降低计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于DiT的视频生成模型因3D注意力机制的二次复杂度导致高推理延迟和计算开销；且标准扩散流程对每帧都进行全时步密集去噪，存在冗余。

Method: 提出RhymeFlow框架：1）选取关键帧进行完整密集去噪；2）非关键帧跳过部分去噪步；3）引入潜在轨迹投影模块，维持时间一致性。

Result: 在多个DiT-based视频生成模型上验证，RhymeFlow相比基线方法具有更高推理速度和更好视觉质量。

Conclusion: 均匀密集去噪对自然视频是冗余的；通过关键帧引导与轨迹投影，可实现高效高质量视频生成。

Abstract: Video generation models based on Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have achieved remarkable performance in video synthesis, yet they suffer from high inference latency and computational costs due to the quadratic complexity of 3D attention. Existing acceleration methods primarily reduce computational complexity within each individual denoising steps through techniques such as sparse attention and KV-caching. However, they rigidly adhere to the inherent constraint of the standard diffusion pipeline: every frame in the target video sequence must be subjected to a complete, dense denoising process across all diffusion timesteps. We observe that due to the corresponding contents and motions among adjacent frames, when keyframes with critical semantic transitions are anchored, the intermediate states of others often follow more predictable trajectories, which indicates that such uniform, dense denoising process is inherently redundant for natural video data. To this end, we introduce \textbf{RhymeFlow}, a training-free framework that decouples the denoising trajectories of different frames. Specifically, we first identify a sparse set of pivotal key frames that dominate the latent semantic evolution. Then, only these keyframes undergo dense, step-by-step denoising to ensure structural integrity, while non-keyframes progressively skip denoising steps to minimize computational cost. Since skipped intermediate states of non-keyframes break the temporal coherence in keyframe denoising steps, leading to visual degradation, we further introduce a latent trajectory projection module, which enables keyframes to interact with a complete and temporally consistent sequence representation. Extensive experiments on current DiT-based video generation models demonstrate our method outperforms existing baselines with higher inference speed and better visual quality.

</details>


### [92] [StoryVideoQA: Scaling Deep Video Understanding with a Large-Scale, Multi-Genre and Auto-Generated Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06338)
*Zhengqian Wu,Zhixian Liu,Aodong Chen,Jingyang Zhang,Ruizhe Li,Hanlin Ge,Zhongyuan Wang,Chunxia Xiao,Chao Liang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出StoryMindv2框架自动生成大规模深度视频理解（DVU）数据集StoryVideoQA（363K问答对），并设计PlotTree模型以分层结构建模长程剧情，提升复杂故事线理解能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VideoQA方法在事实型问答上表现良好，但在需要理解复杂剧情的深度视频理解（DVU）任务上受限于人工构建DVU数据集规模小、多样性低；此前的StoryMind虽能生成TV剧高质量问答，但难以处理更长更复杂的电影。

Method: 提出StoryMindv2多智能体协作框架，包含监督者引导生成机制与多评审员投票策略，用于构建大规模DVU数据集StoryVideoQA；同时提出PlotTree视频理解代理，将长程视频内容重组织为分层剧情树结构以支持剧情推理。

Result: 构建了目前最大DVU数据集StoryVideoQA（363K QA对，覆盖393.2小时多样视频，含TV剧与电影）；在该基准上评估20种SOTA VideoQA方法，发现其在长程角色关联与连贯剧情理解上仍存在明显不足；PlotTree在StoryVideoQA上展现出更强的复杂剧情理解能力。

Conclusion: StoryMindv2和PlotTree共同推动了深度视频理解的发展：前者解决了DVU数据稀缺问题，后者提供了面向复杂叙事的新型建模范式，为未来长程视频理解研究奠定基础。

Abstract: Video question answering (VideoQA) aims to answer questions about given videos. While existing approaches excel on factoid VideoQA, they struggle with deep video understanding (DVU), which requires the comprehension of complex storylines. This challenge arises from the inherent long-range video content, multi-faceted question types, and instance-level story elements, all of which constrain the scale and diversity of manually constructed DVU datasets. These difficulties constrain the scale and diversity of manually-constructed DVU dataset. To address these, we previously introduced StoryMind to automatically construct DVU datasets with balanced fine-grained topics. Though it can generate high-quality question-answer pairs (QAs) for TV series, it suffers significant performance degradation when handling longer and more complex movies. In this paper, we further design StoryMindv2, an enhanced multi-agent collaboration framework to generate high-quality DVU datasets for both TV series and movies. By integrating a novel supervisor-guided generation mechanism and a refined multi-reviewer voting strategy, the framework is utilized to construct StoryVideoQA, the largest DVU dataset to date, featuring over 363K QAs on 393.2 hours diverse story videos including TV series (avg. 1,635 seconds) and movies (avg. 7,878 seconds). Comprehensive evaluations of 20 state-of-the-art VideoQA methods on this large-scale benchmark reveal that they cannot fully maintain long-range character associations or construct a coherent understanding of complex storylines. To bridge this gap, we propose PlotTree, a novel video understanding agent, re-organizing long-range video content into a hierarchical plot structure, enabling efficient storyline reasoning on StoryVideoQA. Project page: https://github.com/nercms-mmap/StoryVideoQA/

</details>


### [93] [Comparison of Deep Learning Frameworks For Rice Disease Mapping From UAV Multispectral Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06359)
*Yadav Raj Ghimire,Jagrati Talreja,Tewodros Syum Gebre,Timothy Agboada,Shikha V. Chandel,Leila Hashemi Beni*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究利用无人机多光谱影像结合CNN与Transformer模型对水稻细菌性条斑病（BLB）严重程度进行语义分割，发现U-Net++（EfficientNet-B3骨干）性能最优（mIoU达97.62%），轻量级CNN仍优于Transformer模型，植被指数（如NDVI、NDRE）融合带来小幅但稳定的精度提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升水稻细菌性条斑病（BLB）田间监测的自动化与精度，推动基于无人机遥感的作物病害早期诊断与精准管理。

Method: 采用U-Net、U-Net++、DeepLabV3+和SegFormer等模型，在统一训练流程下，对比三种输入配置（仅多光谱、多光谱+NDVI、多光谱+NDRE），使用公开BLB数据集进行语义分割实验，并以mIoU、mF1、mAcc、精确率和召回率评估性能。

Result: U-Net++（EfficientNet-B3）取得最高mIoU（97.62%）；SegFormer推理速度相当但分割精度较低；融合植被指数带来小幅且一致的性能提升；轻量级CNN架构在实际部署中更可靠。

Conclusion: 轻量级CNN（尤其是U-Net++）仍是BLB遥感监测的首选；标准化无人机病害数据集对方法比较至关重要；植被指数可作为有效辅助特征，但非决定性；建议优先采用CNN架构进行田间落地应用。

Abstract: In this study, UAV multispectral imagery is used to segment the severity of bacterial leaf blight (BLB) in rice using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and transformer-based models. The evaluated architectures include U-Net with a ResNet- 101 encoder, U-Net++ with EfficientNet-B3 and EfficientNetB7, DeepLabV3+, and SegFormer, all trained under a common pipeline with three input configurations (multispectral only, multispectral+NDVI, and multispectral+NDRE). Experiments are conducted using the publicly available BLB dataset with performance reported using mean IoU (mIoU), mean F1 (mF1), mean accuracy (mAcc), precision, and recall. U-Net++ with EfficientNet-B3 achieved the highest performance, with an mIoU of 97.62%. SegFormer obtained lower segmentation accuracy but comparable inference speed. Overall, the results indicate that lightweight CNN backbones remain more reliable for operational BLB monitoring while integration of vegetation indices provides small and consistent improvements. The study also highlights the value of standardised UAV datasets to compare disease mapping methods and encourages the use of CNN architectures for field implementation.

</details>


### [94] [Physics in 2-Steps: Locking Motion Priors Before Visual Refinement Erases Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06361)
*Woojung Han,Seil Kang,Youngjun Jun,Min-Hung Chen,Fu-En Yang,Seong Jae Hwang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现图像到视频扩散模型中，较少步数（如2步）的生成结果在物理一致性上优于较多步数（如50步）的结果，原因在于去噪过程中相位信息严重退化；为此提出无需训练的PhaseLock框架，通过从少量步数中提取运动先验并利用潜在差分引导将其注入高保真生成过程，显著提升物理一致性且几乎不增加计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图像到视频扩散模型虽能生成高质量视频，但常产生违背物理规律的运动；现有方法依赖多步推理或外部物理引导，计算开销大，而作者观察到少步生成反而更符合物理规律，由此探究其内在机理并寻求高效改进方案。

Method: 通过频谱分析揭示去噪过程中相位退化是物理不一致的主因；提出PhaseLock：在2步推理中提取有效运动先验，结合Latent Delta Guidance机制，在后续高步数生成中约束相位演化，全程无需额外训练。

Result: 在多个模型上平均提升物理一致性6.2分，视觉保真度基本不变，推理时间仅增加1.06倍、内存仅增1.02倍，并减少约5倍对外部引导方法的依赖。

Conclusion: 相位信息对视频物理一致性至关重要；PhaseLock以极小开销实现显著提升，为扩散模型的可控生成提供了新思路——不必牺牲质量或效率即可增强物理合理性。

Abstract: Image-to-Video diffusion models leverage input images to generate visually stunning content, yet frequently produce motion that violates physical laws. We reveal a surprising finding: a 2-step generation often exhibits better physical consistency than a 50-step output from the same model. Through spectral analysis, we trace this to phase erosion during denoising; the phase degrades significantly (dropping by $\approx 18\%$ from step 2 to step 50), whereas the magnitude remains relatively stable. Building on this insight, we propose PhaseLock, a training-free framework that preserves the valid motion priors from few-step inference throughout the denoising trajectory. Rather than relying on full-step inference for physical consistency, PhaseLock extracts a motion prior from just 2 steps and enforces it onto high-fidelity generation via Latent Delta Guidance. Our approach effectively mitigates phase degradation, improving physical consistency by an average of 6.2 points across diverse models while largely maintaining visual fidelity, with negligible overhead ($1.06\times$ time, $1.02\times$ memory) and reduced reliance on expensive external guidance methods ($\sim5\times$ time).

</details>


### [95] [GMBFormer: An NDVI-Guided Global Memory Bank Transformer for Urban Green-Space Extraction from Ultra-High-Resolution Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06363)
*Hao Lei,Xi Cheng,Chenlu Shu,Zhiheng Chen,Zhengjie Duan,Haoyu Wang,Zhanfeng Shen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出GMBFormer框架，通过解耦NDVI作为物理感知门控机制，并结合选择性原型检索与全局记忆库，提升超高清影像中城市绿地提取的精度与语义一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法逐块处理导致语义复用受限，且直接融合NDVI会混淆视觉特征学习与植被置信度建模。

Method: 基于SegFormer设计，仅RGB输入主干网络，NDVI被解耦为物理信息门控，通过动量更新将高置信植被描述符存入紧凑全局记忆库；当前图像块通过内存中介交叉注意力查询并融合检索到的原型。

Result: 在自建成都UHR数据集及ISPRS Potsdam子集上，mIoU/mDice分别达89.25%/94.31%、92.17%/95.92%、83.72%/90.86%，均优于SegFormer-B4基线。

Conclusion: 解耦NDVI门控、记忆检索机制、记忆容量与动量更新共同决定性能，验证了物理先验与语义记忆协同建模的有效性。

Abstract: Urban green-space extraction from ultra-high-resolution (UHR) imagery is commonly performed patch by patch, which limits semantic reuse among spatially separated but visually similar vegetation patterns. Directly injecting the Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) into red-green-blue (RGB) backbones can also blur the roles of visual appearance learning and physical vegetation confidence. We propose GMBFormer, a SegFormer-based framework that replaces adjacency-driven feature propagation with selective, similarity-driven prototype retrieval. Only RGB channels enter the backbone and decoder, while NDVI is decoupled as a physics-informed gate that admits high-confidence vegetation descriptors into a compact global memory bank through momentum updates. During training and inference, the current patch queries stored prototypes through memory-mediated cross-attention, and the retrieved response is integrated with bounded overhead. Experiments use a self-constructed Chengdu UHR dataset with 7,700 labeled 512 x 512 patches and two reduced-label settings derived from the public International Society for Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing (ISPRS) Potsdam dataset. Under the same training and evaluation protocol, GMBFormer obtains mean intersection over union (mIoU)/mean Dice (mDice) scores of 89.25%/94.31%, 92.17%/95.92%, and 83.72%/90.86%, respectively, improving the controlled SegFormer-B4 baseline in each setting. Ablation studies indicate that decoupled NDVI admission, memory retrieval, capacity, and momentum jointly shape the final performance.

</details>


### [96] [Visual Commonsense Driven Knowledge Refinements for Scene Graph Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06369)
*Maëlic Neau,Salim Baloch,Jakob Suchan,Zoe Falomir,Mehul Bhatt*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种模型无关、语义引导的知识精炼框架，利用常识推理在推理阶段修正场景图生成（SGG）结果，无需人工规则或模型重训练，在多个基准上显著提升稀疏标注下的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习驱动的场景图生成模型在关系标注稀疏时性能急剧下降，难以捕获可靠的视觉常识知识。

Method: 提出一种模型无关、语义引导的知识精炼框架，从训练数据中系统挖掘基于常识的空间、功能和定性关系约束，并在推理阶段利用通用声明式常识推理对SGG排序结果进行修正与精炼。

Result: 在三个标准基准上一致优于强基线模型，验证了结构化视觉常识推理对深度场景语义建模的有效性和实用性。

Conclusion: 结构化视觉常识推理是纯学习型场景图生成的有效且实用的补充，该框架无需人工规则、无需重训练，具备跨数据集与架构的可迁移性。

Abstract: Learning-driven Scene Graph Generation (SGG) models excel on frequent relation types but degrade sharply under annotation sparsity, failing to capture reliable visual commonsense knowledge. We propose a model-agnostic, semantically-guided knowledge refinement framework that systematically mines commonsense-grounded constraints from training data - capturing spatial, functional, and qualitative relational regularities - and uses general declarative commonsense reasoning to correct and refine ranked SGG predictions at inference time. The framework requires no manual rule authoring, no model retraining, and transfers across datasets and architectures. On three standard benchmarks, we obtain consistent improvements over strong baselines, demonstrating that structured visual commonsense reasoning over deep scene semantics is a practical and effective complement to purely learning-based scene graph generation.

</details>


### [97] [EasyLens: A Training-Free Plug-and-Play Subtle-Lesion Representation Amplifier for Medical Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06379)
*Qiwei Zeng,Hao Wang,Jinghao Lin,Shuchang Ye,Yuezhe Yang,Yige Peng,Haoyuan Che,Jinman Kim,Lei Bi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出EasyLens，一种无需训练、即插即用的医学视觉语言模型（VLM）子病变表征增强方法，通过构建病理-解剖原型空间（EasyBank）、反事实原型推理筛选病灶相关图像块（EasyTag），以及形态引导的残差增强（EasyAmplifier）来提升对微弱病灶的敏感性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医学VLM对细微病灶（如低对比度、稀疏、嵌入复杂解剖背景）敏感性不足，因局部视觉token聚合导致弱线索在全局表征中被稀释；而现有改进方法多需额外训练或模型适配，泛化性与冻结模型兼容性差。

Method: 提出三模块无训练框架EasyLens：1）EasyBank构建病理-解剖原型空间，提供病灶原型与解剖正常参考；2）EasyTag基于反事实原型推理筛选真正病灶相关图像块；3）EasyAmplifier通过形态引导的残差增强强化所选块表征，提升其对全局嵌入的贡献。

Result: 在多个医学图像数据集及冻结VLM主干上实验表明，EasyLens显著提升细微病灶检测性能，优于现有编码器增强基线。

Conclusion: EasyLens是一种通用、轻量、训练无关的即插即用方案，有效缓解冻结医学VLM对细微病灶表征不足的问题，提升其临床实用性。

Abstract: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) have shown increasing potential for clinical image interpretation, including lesion detection and report generation. However, their practical utility remains limited by insufficient sensitivity to subtle lesions, whose visual evidence is often sparse, low-contrast, and embedded within complex anatomical context. As local visual tokens are aggregated, these weak lesion cues can become underrepresented in global image representations, making them difficult for medical VLMs to recognize. Existing efforts to improve lesion sensitivity mainly rely on medical-domain vision-encoder pre-training, clinical-term-guided alignment, or trainable pathological representation enhancement. Although effective, these approaches usually require additional training or model-specific adaptation and may overfit to particular disease morphologies, limiting their applicability to frozen medical VLMs. To address these limitations, we propose EasyLens, a training-free plug-and-play subtle-lesion representation amplifier for medical VLMs. EasyLens first constructs EasyBank, a pathology-anatomy prototype space that provides lesion-related prototypes and anatomy-aware normal references for comparing suspicious patches against both pathological and normal anatomical patterns. To avoid blindly amplifying normal tissues, EasyTag selects lesion-relevant patches through counterfactual prototype reasoning. To counteract the dilution of subtle lesion cues in global image representations, EasyAmplifier strengthens the selected lesion-relevant patch representations through morphology-guided residual enhancement, thereby increasing their contribution to the global image embedding. Experiments on multiple medical image datasets and frozen medical VLM backbones show that EasyLens improves subtle-lesion detection and outperforms existing encoder-enhancement baselines.

</details>


### [98] [HomeWorld: A Unified Floorplan-to-Furnished Framework for Generating Controllable, Densely Interactive Whole-Home Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06390)
*Wenbo Li,Xiaoliang Ju,Zipeng Qin,Rongyao Fang,Hongsheng Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种分层统一框架，用于生成具有全局一致性、高真实感和仿真就绪性的全屋室内场景，结合大语言模型生成户型图、多视角图像生成家具布局、VLM修正与3D生成模型替换资产，并发布大规模户型数据集与5K全屋场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖手工规则或局限于子任务（如户型生成或单房间布置），难以生成全局连贯、真实且适用于机器人仿真的全屋3D场景；同时面临复杂布局建模难和3D场景数据稀缺的挑战。

Method: 构建分层生成框架：1）基于30万真实住宅户型图训练大语言模型生成可控全屋户型；2）利用图像生成模型从多视角生成家具布局；3）在支撑表面上生成可操作小物体；4）引入VLM refiner迭代修正布局，并用3D生成模型灵活替换资产；5）附加物理属性、表面纹理与光照以支持具身AI仿真。

Result: 实验与用户研究表明，该方法在布局多样性与3D设计吸引力上显著优于先前方法，在定量与定性指标上均取得提升；并开源30万户型数据集与5K全屋已布置场景。

Conclusion: 所提分层框架有效解决了全屋室内场景生成中的全局一致性、真实感与仿真可用性难题，为具身AI与室内设计提供了可扩展、可控且高质量的生成方案。

Abstract: Indoor scene generation is crucial for robot simulation and modern interior design. However, complex layouts together with scarce 3D scene data make learning-based generation challenging. Existing methods often rely on hand-crafted rules or focus on isolated sub-tasks (e.g., floorplan synthesis or single-room furnishing), producing whole-home scenes that lack global coherence, realism, and simulation readiness. To mitigate these limitations, we propose a unified hierarchical framework that decomposes indoor scene synthesis into controllable stages. First, we curate a large-scale dataset of 300K real residential floorplans to train a large language model for whole-home floorplan generation. With detailed descriptions and a K-D tree-based representation, our method enables fine-grained, controllable whole-home floorplan generation. Building upon the generated whole-home floorplan, we leverage image generation models to draft furniture layouts from multi-level roaming viewpoints, and then generate the layouts of small manipulable objects on different supporting surfaces (e.g., cabinets, desks, and dining tables) for embodied AI simulation. During furniture and object layout generation, a VLM-based refiner iteratively corrects furniture and object placement, and a 3D generative model enables flexible replacement of individual assets. We further attach basic physical attributes and simple surface texture and lighting setups to complete the pipeline for embodied AI use. Experiments and user studies demonstrate that our pipeline produces indoor spaces with greater layout diversity and stronger 3D design appeal, outperforming prior methods on both quantitative and qualitative metrics. Finally, alongside our generation pipeline, we will release the floorplan dataset and 5K fully furnished scenes to the community. Project Page: https://kairos-homeworld.github.io/

</details>


### [99] [Thinking with Imagination: Agentic Visual Spatial Reasoning with World Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06476)
*Chenming Zhu,Jingli Lin,Yilin Long,Peizhou Cao,Tai Wang,Jiangmiao Pang,Xihui Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Astra框架，通过将视觉语言模型（VLM）与基于Bagel的世界模拟器（Astra-WM）结合，并引入动作条件下的视觉想象能力（Astra-VL），提升VLM在有限第一人称观察下的空间推理能力；核心创新包括视图一致性调优和世界模拟器闭环的两阶段强化学习课程，实验证明该方法显著提升多个空间推理基准性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）的空间推理能力受限于仅能依赖已观测图像和文本链式思维，难以推断未见布局、保持跨视角一致性或从替代视角推理，尤其在仅有有限第一人称观察时表现不足。

Method: 提出Astra框架，包含：1）Astra-VL——一个经强化学习训练的VLM策略，用于决策何时及如何调用模拟器；2）Astra-WM——基于Bagel的世界模拟器，根据上下文图像和自然语言描述的相机运动生成新视角观测；其训练中引入视图一致性调优以增强姿态与内容一致性；3）世界模拟器闭环的两阶段RL课程，稳定工具使用探索并促使模型仅在想象观测优于直接回答时才调用模拟器。

Result: Astra-WM使Gemini-3-Flash在MMSI-Bench上从45.1提升至49.5；Astra-VL使Qwen3-VL在MMSI-Bench上从29.8升至38.8，在MindCube上从36.8升至42.7。消融表明世界模拟器与智能体策略均不可或缺。

Conclusion: 想象观测可提供有效的空间证据，但实现高效的世界模型增强推理需系统性学习‘何时、何地、如何’进行想象；Astra为VLM赋予具身化、交互式的空间想象力，推动视觉语言模型向更通用的空间认知迈进。

Abstract: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong visual reasoning capabilities, their spatial reasoning abilities remain largely constrained to the observed images and text-oriented chain-of-thought. They often struggle to infer unobserved layouts, maintain cross-view consistency, and reason from alternative viewpoints when only limited egocentric observations are available. In this work, we study this problem as thinking with imagination, where a VLM actively acquires imagined visual evidence by interacting with a world simulator during reasoning. We propose Astra, an agentic spatial reasoning framework that empowers VLMs with action-conditioned visual imagination. Specifically, Astra couples Astra-VL, an RL-trained VLM policy, with Astra-WM, a Bagel-based world simulator that generates novel-view observations from context images and natural-language camera motions. To provide reliable imagined evidence, Astra-WM is trained with view consistency tuning to improve pose and content consistency across views. In the RL stage, we propose a world-simulator-in-the-loop two-phase RL curriculum to stabilize tool-use exploration and advance the model's ability to invoke the simulator only when imagined observations improve over direct answering. Experiments demonstrate that both the world simulator and the agentic policy are necessary: Astra-WM improves simulator-augmented Gemini-3-Flash on MMSI-Bench from 45.1 to 49.5, while Astra-VL improves the Qwen3-VL backbone from 29.8 to 38.8 on MMSI-Bench and from 36.8 to 42.7 on MindCube. These results show that imagined observations can provide useful spatial evidence, but effective world-model-augmented reasoning requires learning when, where, and how to imagine.

</details>


### [100] [Complexity-Balanced Diffusion Splitting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06477)
*Noam Issachar,Dani Lischinski,Raanan Fattal*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Complexity-Balanced Splitting（CBS）的框架，通过根据生成动态的局部复杂度在时间维度上分配不同容量的子网络，提升连续时间生成模型的效率与质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准连续时间生成模型使用单一庞大网络处理整个生成过程，但不同时间阶段的信号复杂度差异巨大，导致资源分配低效。

Method: 基于函数逼近理论和de Boor等分布原理，CBS将扩散时间轴划分为近似负担相等的段，并引入两个可计算的监测函数（基于流的Dirichlet能量和采样轨迹加速度）评估局部复杂度，再用轻量辅助模型估计复杂度分布，实现自动、高效的时间容量分配。

Result: 在SiT、JiT、UNet等多种架构和多个数据集上验证，CBS显著提升生成质量（如SiT-XL+CFG下FID提升约35%），且不增加单步推理开销。

Conclusion: CBS提供了一种理论驱动、实践高效的时间维度模型容量分配新范式，兼顾性能与计算效率。

Abstract: Standard continuous-time generative models rely on monolithic architectures that must navigate vastly different signal regimes, from isotropic noise to intricate data distributions. While scaling model capacity improves performance, deploying a massive network uniformly across the entire generative timeline is inherently inefficient. In this work, we propose Complexity-Balanced Splitting (CBS), a principled framework for temporal capacity allocation that distributes the generative workload across multiple specialized sub-networks. Grounded in function approximation theory and de Boor's equidistribution principle, CBS partitions the diffusion timeline into segments of equal approximation burden, allocating more representational capacity to regions where the generative dynamics are more difficult to model. To estimate this local complexity, we introduce two complementary and tractable monitor functions: a spatial measure based on the flow's Dirichlet energy, and a geometric measure based on the acceleration of the sampling trajectories. Using a lightweight auxiliary model to estimate these complexity profiles, our approach eliminates the need for heuristic temporal splits or computationally expensive search procedures. Extensive evaluation across multiple architectures (SiT, JiT, and UNet) and datasets demonstrates that CBS consistently improves synthesis quality without increasing per-step inference cost. In particular, CBS improves FID by ~35% on SiT-XL with CFG relative to naive temporal partitioning. Project page is available at https://noamissachar.github.io/CBS/.

</details>


### [101] [PAR3D: A Unified 3D-MLLM with Part-Aware Representation for Scene Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06485)
*Shaohui Dai,Yansong Qu,You Shen,Shengchuan Zhang,Liujuan Cao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了PAR3D，一种统一的、具备部件感知能力的3D多模态大语言模型框架，通过新构建的ScenePart数据集和部件感知的3D表征学习方法，显著提升了3D场景中部件级理解与定位能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D多模态大语言模型以物体为中心，难以建模对具身交互至关重要的细粒度部件结构。

Method: 提出PAR3D框架，包括：1）合成数据集ScenePart（含部件级标注与语言指令）；2）部件感知的3D表征学习；3）分层分割查询生成机制（Hierarchical Segmentation Query Generation）。

Result: 在部件级视觉问答和指代表分割任务上显著提升性能，同时在物体级跨模态任务上保持强竞争力。

Conclusion: 部件感知能力可有效增强3D-MLLM对复杂3D场景的理解与交互能力，为具身智能提供更精细的语义基础。

Abstract: Recent advances in 3D multimodal large language models (3D-MLLMs) have enabled unified solutions for 3D scene understanding tasks, including visual question answering, captioning, and referring segmentation. However, existing 3D-MLLMs remain largely object-centric, limiting their ability to model fine-grained part structures that are essential for embodied interaction with 3D environments. In this work, we present PAR3D, a unified part-aware 3D-MLLM framework that enables models to understand, reason about, and ground both objects and their parts in 3D scenes. To enable training and evaluation of part-aware 3D scene understanding, we introduce ScenePart, a synthetic 3D scene dataset with part-level annotations and language instructions. We further develop Part-Aware 3D Representation Learning to enrich 3D visual representations with fine-grained part-level semantics, and propose Hierarchical Segmentation Query Generation to ground part targets via hierarchical object-part queries. Extensive experiments show that our method substantially improves part-level question answering and referring segmentation, while also achieving strong performance across object-level vision-language tasks.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [102] [Epidemiology of Model Collapse: Modeling Synthetic Data Contamination via Bilayer SIR Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05168)
*Xiangyu Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出双层耦合SIR/SIRS模型，将数据集和AI模型视为相互作用的两个种群，用流行病学方法建模合成数据污染的跨层传播，并发现检测能力是抑制模型崩溃最关键的干预因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究将合成数据训练导致的模型崩溃视为单链退化过程，但现实中AI生态中存在模型间交叉污染：模型摄入其他模型生成的合成数据、产生新合成文本并污染共享语料库，需更符合实际的动态建模。

Method: 构建双层耦合SIR/SIRS平均场模型，将数据语料库与AI模型分别建模为具有易感（S）、感染（I）、恢复（R）状态的交互种群；引入免疫力衰减机制（SIRS）；通过下一代矩阵推导基本再生数R₀；结合公开AI文本占比数据进行情景校准、Sobol敏感性分析、双部图ABM模拟及GPT-2实证实验。

Result: R₀ > 1表明系统处于超临界污染状态；敏感性分析显示合成文本检测能力是最高杠杆参数；ABM验证了均值场模型在稠密网络下的高一致性（R² > 0.96），但在异质网络中性能下降；GPT-2实验证实剂量依赖性性能退化与多样性损失；多源混合仅在高污染比例下有微弱缓解效应。

Conclusion: 合成数据污染本质上是跨层耦合的流行病过程，单纯依赖数据清洗或重训练不足以根治；最有效的干预策略是提升合成文本检测精度与构建‘群体免疫’机制（即高质量原始数据主导训练生态）。

Abstract: Training on synthetic data causes model collapse, but existing analyses treat this as single-chain degradation. In reality, the AI ecosystem involves cross-contamination: models ingest synthetic data from other models, produce new synthetic text, and contaminate shared corpora. We propose a bilayer coupled SIR/SIRS framework -- a phenomenological mean-field model treating data corpora and AI models as two interacting populations, each with susceptible, infected, and recovered compartments linked by cross-layer transmission. The SIRS variant (our primary recommendation) incorporates immunity waning, reflecting that filtered corpora and retrained models remain susceptible to re-contamination. We derive the basic reproduction number $R_0 = \sqrt{β_D β_M / [(γ_D+μ_D)(γ_M+μ_M)]}$ via the Next Generation Matrix and apply standard epidemic threshold results to the bilayer system. Illustrative scenario-based calibration from public AI text prevalence data yields supercritical dynamics ($R_0 > 1$) across three scenarios; Sobol sensitivity analysis identifies synthetic-text detection as the highest-leverage parameter. A bipartite-network agent-based model confirms mean-field consistency ($R^2 > 0.96$) for dense networks but degrades under heterogeneity. GPT-2 contamination chain experiments (192 runs across WikiText and Shakespeare) show dose-response degradation and diversity loss qualitatively consistent with the threshold picture. Matched-budget source-diversity experiments (1,088 runs) provide suggestive evidence that multi-source mixing modestly attenuates collapse, but the effect vanishes at lower contamination fractions. Intervention analysis identifies detection-based filtering and herd immunity as the highest-leverage strategies.

</details>


### [103] [Predict and Reconstruct: Joint Objectives for Self-Supervised Language Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05173)
*Aimen Boukhari*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合JEPA式潜在空间预测损失与标准MLM目标的混合预训练方法，通过可学习标量平衡两者，在相同设置下验证其能提升嵌入均匀性、改善谱几何结构并减少表层词汇信息依赖，但线性探针准确率与纯MLM相近。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MLM虽主流，但易使表征过度依赖词元表面形式，而非深层语义结构；受视觉/音频中JEPA成功的启发，探索更语义化的文本表征学习方式。

Method: 设计混合预训练目标：共享编码器同时优化JEPA风格的潜在空间预测损失和标准MLM损失，引入可学习标量动态加权；在英文Wikipedia上与纯MLM基线同构同算力对比训练；使用五项GLUE任务与四种池化策略进行表征分析。

Result: 混合模型嵌入均匀性显著更高（uniformity < -0.16 vs -0.05），最大池化下谱几何更丰富，编码的表层词汇信息更少，语义-词汇平衡更优；线性探针下游准确率与MLM相当，但几何差异稳定显著。

Conclusion: JEPA式预测目标能有效重塑语言模型隐空间结构，提升语义表征质量，而该改进无法仅由传统准确率指标反映，需借助几何与信息论视角评估。

Abstract: Masked language modelling (MLM) has been the dominant pre-training objective for text encoders since BERT, yet it encourages representations that are strongly anchored to surface-form token identity rather than deeper semantic structure. Inspired by the success of Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPA) (LeCun, 2022) in vision and audio, we propose a hybrid pre-training objective that combines a JEPA-style latent-space prediction loss with a standard MLM objective over a single shared encoder. A learnable scalar parameter continuously balances the two objectives during training. We pre-train both a hybrid model and a pure-MLM baseline on English Wikipedia using identical architectures and compute budgets (NVIDIA H100). Extensive representation analysis across five GLUE benchmarks (SST-2, MRPC, MNLI, CoLA, STS-B) using four pooling strategies reveals that the hybrid encoder produces significantly more uniform embeddings (uniformity less than -0.16 vs -0.05 for MLM), exhibits richer spectral geometry under max pooling, encodes less surface-level lexical information, and achieves a better semantic-to-lexical balance. Despite similar linear-probe downstream accuracy, the geometric differences are consistent and significant, suggesting that the JEPA predictive objective reshapes the latent space in ways that standard accuracy metrics alone cannot capture.

</details>


### [104] [Improving Heart-Focused Medical Question Answering in LLMs via Variance-Aware Rubric Rewards with GRPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05174)
*Arash Ahmadi,Parisa Masnadi,Sarah Sharif,Charles Nicholson,David Ebert,Mike Banad*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于评分标准的方差感知奖励框架，用于在心脏医学问答任务中通过GRPO算法对大语言模型进行后训练优化，显著提升了小模型在该任务上的性能，并接近超大规模开源模型的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用大语言模型在医疗场景部署面临数据隐私、推理成本高及边缘设备适配难等问题，需开发更小、更高效的模型并辅以可靠的后训练策略以保障医学推理能力。

Method: 采用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）算法，在心脏医学问答任务上对LLM进行后训练；提出方差感知奖励框架，改进Rubrics as Rewards中的显式与隐式聚合策略，用基于准则级评分的连续解析奖励函数替代加权二值聚合和单一Likert评分。

Result: 在HealthBench心脏子集上，最优GRPO变体将Qwen3-14B基线的准确率从0.362提升至0.502，F1从0.532提升至0.668，性能接近GPT-OSS-120B（0.508准确率，0.674 F1）。

Conclusion: 精心设计的基于评分标准的奖励机制是提升LLM在心脏医学问答等专业任务中表现的有效且实用的策略，具备向其他评分标准驱动任务拓展的潜力。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong promise in healthcare applications. Yet deploying general-purpose models in real-world settings remains difficult due to data privacy constraints, inference costs, and limited suitability for edge or on-device use. These challenges motivate the development of smaller, more efficient models that require robust post-training strategies to ensure reliable medical reasoning. In this work, we investigate Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) for post-training LLMs on heart-focused medical question answering with rubric-based supervision derived from RaR-Medicine. We propose a Variance-Aware Reward Framework that extends the Explicit Aggregation and Implicit Aggregation strategies of Rubrics as Rewards by replacing weighted binary criterion aggregation and single overall Likert-style scoring with continuous analytical reward functions derived from criterion-level rubric outcomes. This formulation provides richer optimization signals for feedback that is sparse, multi-criteria, and difficult to verify automatically, and enables more stable on-policy reinforcement learning. On a held-out heart-related subset of HealthBench, our best GRPO variant improves accuracy from 0.362 to 0.502 and F1 from 0.532 to 0.668 relative to the Qwen3-14B base model, while remaining competitive with GPT-OSS-120B (0.508 accuracy, 0.674 F1). Our findings show that carefully designed rubric-based rewards provide a practical strategy for improving heart-focused medical question answering in LLMs, with potential to extend to other rubric-based tasks.

</details>


### [105] [Generic Triple-Latent Compression with Gated Associative Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05175)
*Liu Xiao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通用的三隐状态序列模型，通过维护运行中的token状态和压缩的pair-memory通路来捕捉高阶token交互，无需针对特定基准进行解析；该模型在字节级WikiText-2和MiniMind语言模型基准上均优于小型Transformer基线，其基于门控键值检索的召回增强版本提升了联想记忆能力，但存在种子敏感性和推理速度慢的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在捕捉更高阶的token交互，避免依赖基准特定的解析方式，提升序列建模的通用性与表达能力。

Method: 设计了通用的三隐状态（triple-latent）序列模型架构，包含运行token状态和压缩pair-memory通路；进一步引入召回导向的门控键值检索机制作为扩展。

Result: 在字节级WikiText-2和tokenizer-based MiniMind基准上均超越小型Transformer基线；召回增强版本提升了联想回忆能力，但表现出种子敏感性且当前实现推理速度显著下降。

Conclusion: 三隐状态建模范式具备通用潜力，尤其在无显式结构假设下建模长程与高阶交互；但召回增强模块需进一步优化以解决效率与鲁棒性问题。

Abstract: We study generic triple-latent sequence models that maintain a running token state and compressed pair-memory pathway to capture higher-order token interactions without benchmark-specific parsing. The triple-latent family improves a small Transformer baseline on byte-level WikiText-2 and on a tokenizer-based MiniMind language-model benchmark, while a recall-focused gated key-value retrieval extension improves associative recall but remains seed-sensitive and much slower in the current reference implementation.

</details>


### [106] [PEFT of SLM for Telecommunications Customer Support: A Comparative Study of LoRA Configurations with Energy Consumption Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05176)
*Lucas Tamic,Ilan Jaffeux-Cheniout,Xavier Marjou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了在电信客户支持领域中，如何通过参数高效微调（LoRA）适配Qwen2.5-3B模型，并提出一种基于行业术语的组合式合成数据生成方法；实验发现验证损失与人类评价结果存在显著偏差，表明仅依赖损失选择微调配置不可靠，并进一步分析了能效权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在电信客户支持领域的评估与适配受限，且面临数据主权、监管合规及敏感信息处理等现实约束，亟需轻量、可控、合规的本地化微调方案。

Method: 采用LoRA对Qwen2.5-3B进行参数高效微调；构建含52个专业术语的词表，通过Gemini 2.0 Flash生成约3万条覆盖1560种问题场景的合成数据；系统评估16种LoRA配置，结合验证损失、能耗测量及LLM-as-a-judge（GPT-5.2和Claude 4.5 Sonnet）进行多维评估。

Result: 验证损失最优（0.5024）的模型在人工对齐性上仅排第6–7位，而损失最差（0.6807）者反而获得双法官最高排名；目标模块选择显著影响性能；不同配置呈现明显能耗-性能权衡。

Conclusion: 验证损失不能作为对话AI微调配置选择的可靠指标；合成数据构建、LoRA模块选择与可持续部署（能效）是构建领域专用轻量助手的关键要素。

Abstract: While large language models (LLMs) show strong performance in natural language understanding and generation, their evaluation and adaptation to domain-specific constraints in telecommunications customer support remain limited. In addition, data sovereignty, regulatory constraints, and the handling of sensitive customer and network information complicate the use of externally hosted foundation models in this domain.
  We present a systematic study of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) applied to Qwen2.5-3B to build a domain-specific conversational assistant. We introduce a combinatorial synthetic data generation approach based on a glossary of 52 industry-specific terms, producing approximately 30,000 training examples across 1,560 distinct problem scenarios via a generative pipeline powered by Gemini 2.0 Flash.
  We evaluate 16 LoRA configurations by varying hyperparameters and target modules. Our evaluation extends beyond standard metrics by incorporating energy consumption analysis and qualitative assessment using an LLM-as-a-judge framework with GPT-5.2 and Claude 4.5 Sonnet.
  Results show a clear divergence between quantitative and qualitative performance: models achieving the lowest validation loss do not necessarily obtain the best human-aligned rankings. The best validation loss (0.5024) ranks only 6th-7th in qualitative evaluation, while the worst loss (0.6807) ranks first according to both judges.
  This work contributes (1) a combinatorial method for synthetic dataset construction, (2) insights into the impact of target module selection for LoRA injection, (3) evidence that validation loss alone is insufficient for selecting fine-tuning configurations in conversational AI, and (4) an energy-performance trade-off analysis for sustainable LLM deployment.

</details>


### [107] [Emergent Language as an Approach to Conscious AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06380)
*Zengqing Wu,Chuan Xiao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种生成式方法——多智能体强化学习中的涌现语言（EL），以研究人工系统是否可能具备意识，避免依赖人类语言先验；在最小化环境中验证了智能体能自发发展出自指性通信及回声-失配检测机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估人工系统意识的方法存在局限：判别式方法依赖理论驱动的清单，架构式方法直接嵌入意识启发模块，二者均难以排除人类语言先验的干扰。

Method: 采用涌现语言（EL）的生成式方法，在多智能体强化学习框架中让智能体从零开始（无语言、无自我概念、极少接触人类文本）仅受任务压力驱动而自主发展通信，确保所观察结构可归因于任务需求而非人类先验。

Result: 在最小环境实证中，智能体自发演化出自我指涉通信，并形成一种回声-失配检测电路；该结构无法由任务结构或网络架构单独预测，而是源于特定环境可供性。

Conclusion: 涌现语言是一种有潜力的生成式工具，可用于因果地探索意识相关结构的起源，尤其凸显环境复杂性与涌现通信解释的关键作用。

Abstract: The question of whether artificial systems can be conscious remains open, in part because existing approaches either evaluate systems against theory-derived checklists (discriminative) or engineer consciousness-inspired modules directly (architectural); both leave open whether observed structures are artifacts of human language priors. We propose a generative methodology: emergent language (EL) in multi-agent reinforcement learning, where agents start from minimal (no language, no concept of self, minimal exposure to human text) and develop communication under task pressure alone, ensuring causal attributability to task demands rather than inherited human language priors. We position our methodology by discussing how EL serves as a generative tool for studying consciousness-relevant structure, including the role of environment complexity and the interpretation of emergent communication. As a proof of concept, we instantiate this methodology in a minimal environment and show that agents develop self-referential communication, including an echo-mismatch detection circuit that is not predicted by task structure or architecture alone but emerges from a specific environmental affordance.

</details>


### [108] [MCBench: A Multicontext Safety Assessment Benchmark for Omni Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05177)
*Manh Luong,Tamas Abraham,Junae Kim,Amar Kaur,Rollin Omari,Gholamreza Haffari,Trang Vu,Lizhen Qu,Dinh Phung*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了MCBench，一个用于评估多模态大语言模型（Omni LLMs）安全性的新基准，涵盖视觉、音频和文本三种模态，发现现有模型在跨模态安全推理方面存在显著缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态安全基准仅关注视觉输入，无法评估能处理视觉、音频和文本的Omni LLMs，因此需要构建能全面评估多模态安全能力的新基准。

Method: 构建MCBench基准，包含1196个涵盖四大安全类别的多模态场景，每个不安全场景均配有一个微小差异的安全对照样本，以检验模型敏感性；并通过对前沿模型进行评测与推理轨迹分析来评估其跨模态安全判断能力。

Result: Omni LLMs在识别细微或非物理风险时表现较差，但在存在显著视听线索时表现较好；模型虽能提取单模态信息，却常难以有效融合多模态线索进行安全判断。

Conclusion: 当前Omni LLMs在安全关键场景中缺乏鲁棒的跨模态推理能力，亟需改进模型架构与训练策略以提升多模态安全性。

Abstract: Existing multimodal safety benchmarks focus solely on visual inputs and cannot assess Omni Large Language Models (LLMs) that process vision, audio, and text. We introduce MCBench, a benchmark with 1196 scenarios spanning four safety categories that require integrating multiple modalities for accurate safety assessment. Each unsafe scenario is paired with a minimally different safe counterpart to assess model sensitivity. Our evaluations of state-of-the-art models reveal significant challenges. Omni LLMs struggle with subtle or non-physical risks but perform better when salient visual or acoustic cues are present. Analysis of reasoning traces shows that, although models can extract modality-specific information, they often fail to integrate these cues effectively for safety judgments. Our findings reveal that current Omni LLMs lack robust cross-modal reasoning in safety-critical settings, underscoring the need for improved architectures and training strategies for multimodal safety.

</details>


### [109] [Efficient Punctuation Restoration via Weighted Lookahead Scoring Method for Streaming ASR Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05179)
*Sungmook Woo,Hyungu Kang,Chanwoo Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种非自回归的标点恢复方法，用于流式ASR系统，在不增加延迟和对齐错误的前提下，通过在每个词边界处对比插入标点假设与无插入基线，并结合固定K子词前瞻和校准阈值进行决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流式ASR中，标点恢复需在线决策且上下文受限，生成式方法易导致延迟和边界对齐失败。

Method: 采用非自回归打分机制，不生成自由文本，而是在每个词边界评估标点插入假设与无插入基线的得分差异，使用固定K子词前瞻、权重α和验证集校准的阈值τ进行决策，推理中不更新参数。

Result: 在IWSLT 2017数据集上，未微调时4类宏F1达0.893（K=2），微调后达0.937，显著优于提示法基线（0.566）和微调ELECTRA基线（0.913）；并通过K的消融实验分析了前瞻窗口的影响。

Conclusion: 所提非自回归打分方法在保持低延迟和高对齐鲁棒性的同时，显著提升了流式ASR中标点恢复的性能，验证了固定前瞻+校准阈值策略的有效性。

Abstract: Punctuation restoration improves ASR (Automatic Speech Recognition) readability. However streaming ASR requires online decisions with limited future context. In streaming ASR, the system predicts punctuation incrementally, which makes generation-based approaches prone to latency and alignment failures under boundary-wise evaluation. This paper proposes a non-autoregressive scoring method (no free-form generation) that preserves the input transcript and makes a decision at each word boundary. Our method compares punctuation insertion hypotheses against a no-insertion baseline under a bounded K-subword-token lookahead, and calibrates decisions using a weight α and a validation-calibrated threshold τ (no parameter updates during inference). On IWSLT 2017, our scoring method achieves a 4-class macro F1 of 0.893 in the no fine-tuning setting (validation-calibrated, K=2) and 0.937 after fine-tuning (K=2), outperforming the prompt-based baseline (0.566) and a fine-tuned ELECTRA baseline (0.913) under the same lookahead budget. We analyze the impact of the lookahead budget through ablation studies on K.

</details>


### [110] [From Scoring to Explanations: Evaluating SHAP and LLM Rationales for Rubric-based Teaching Quality Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05180)
*Ivo Bueno,Babette Bühler,Philipp Stark,Tim Fütterer,Ulrich Trautwein,Dorottya Demszky,Heather Hill,Enkelejda Kasneci*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合SHAP值归因与大语言模型（LLM）生成理由的句子级可解释性框架，用于基于评分标准的自动评分任务；在CLASS框架的‘反馈质量’维度上验证表明，微调预训练语言模型（PLM）预测更准但存在中段分数压缩，而SHAP归因比LLM理由更可靠、更可迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动评分模型缺乏对评分结果的可解释性，难以理解为何给出某一分数，尤其在高利害教育评估场景中亟需可信、可验证的解释机制。

Method: 构建融合模型无关SHAP值归因与LLM生成理由的句子级可解释性框架，并在NCTE语料库上，针对CLASS框架的‘反馈质量’维度，系统比较微调PLMs与提示式LLMs在评分性能与解释忠实性两方面的表现，采用删除测试与跨模型归因迁移分析进行验证。

Result: 在6千条标注转录片段上，微调PLMs预测准确率高于LLMs但存在中段分数压缩；SHAP识别出的驱动句能引发更大、更连贯的预测变化，且其归因在不同模型间具有强迁移性，而LLM理由影响有限且不一致。

Conclusion: SHAP提供比LLM理由更忠实、更可迁移的解释；所提框架为高利害教育评估等基于评分标准的语言评估任务中评分模型及其解释的评估提供了原则性基础。

Abstract: Automated scoring models are increasingly used to assign rubric-based quality ratings to complex language performances, including classroom transcripts, yet they typically provide little insight into why a particular score is produced. We propose a general framework for sentence-level interpretability of rubric-based scoring that combines model-agnostic Shapley-value attributions with rationales generated by large language models (LLMs). Instantiated on the Quality of Feedback dimension of the CLASS framework using the NCTE corpus, the framework enables systematic comparison of fine-tuned pretrained language models (PLMs) and prompted LLMs on both scoring performance and explanation faithfulness. Across 6k annotated transcript segments, fine-tuned PLMs outperform LLMs in prediction accuracy but exhibit label compression toward mid-scale scores. Deletion-based tests show that SHAP identifies sentences that reliably drive model predictions, producing typically larger and more coherent prediction shifts than LLM-generated rationales. Cross-model analyses further reveal that SHAP attributions transfer robustly across architectures, whereas LLM rationales exert limited and inconsistent influence. Overall, the findings demonstrate that SHAP provides more faithful and transferable explanations for rubric-based scoring, and that the proposed framework offers a principled basis for evaluating both scoring models and their explanations in high-stakes educational settings and other rubric-based language assessment tasks.

</details>


### [111] [Multi-Granularity Reasoning for Natural Language Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05181)
*Chunling Xi,Di Liang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多粒度推理网络（MGRN），通过显式建模词汇、短语和上下文等多层次语义特征，提升自然语言推理（NLI）任务的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于Transformer的NLI方法主要依赖最后一层token表示，难以充分捕捉细粒度词汇线索、短语组合及高层上下文语义之间的复杂层次交互。

Method: 提出多粒度推理网络（MGRN），在交互式推理空间中分阶段融合词汇级、短语级和上下文级语义特征，模拟人类从表层匹配到深层逻辑推理的认知过程。

Result: 在多个公开NLI基准上显著优于强基线模型，验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 显式建模多粒度语义特征对提升NLI性能至关重要，MGRN为复杂语义关系建模提供了新思路。
